description_long: This is a large, rectangular chest of drawers constructed from dark-stained wood, featuring a smooth, flat top surface suitable for placing items. The front face is organized into six equally sized drawers, arranged in two rows of three, each equipped with a recessed handle for easy opening. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a natural and elegant appearance, while the sides and back are plain with no additional ornamentation. The legs are short and sturdy, providing stable support and a slight elevation from the ground. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with no visible locks or decorative embellishments. This chest of drawers would be well-suited for use in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or garages.
description: A large, dark wood chest of drawers with six recessed-handle drawers and a smooth, flat top. Its minimalist design features visible wood grain and sturdy construction.
description_view_0: Front view showing six drawers with recessed handles and the full width of the chest.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth and plain wooden side panel, with no drawers visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned wooden back panel with no functional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain wooden side panel.
